name: Tel-U-Watt
description_short: Tel-U-Watt Federal Credit Union serves the Minot, ND community with checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and online banking services for personal and business financial needs.
description_long:
Tel-U-Watt Federal Credit Union is a community-based financial institution serving Minot, North Dakota and surrounding service areas. According to NCUA records cited on their website, they maintain 363 active share savings accounts and offer a range of traditional credit union services. The organization positions itself as enhancing financial well-being through member-focused banking solutions.

Tel-U-Watt offers high-yield checking and savings accounts (Share Draft and Share Savings accounts), flexible auto loans for both new and used vehicles, mortgage options, online and mobile banking platforms, investment and retirement planning, and credit builder loans. They provide competitive rates starting at 5.00% for new auto loans and 6.00% for used auto loans, with an average auto loan amount of $25,000. The credit union also offers financial planning, wealth management, and exclusive member benefits.

As a federally-chartered credit union (FCU), Tel-U-Watt distinguishes itself through NCUA oversight, member-ownership structure, and localized community focus in Minot. They provide dedicated branch services, a branch locator tool, online account management, and multiple calculators for auto loans, mortgages, and savings planning. Member contact is available at (701) 838-9810.

A notable limitation is that their checking account offerings show 0 active accounts according to NCUA data presented on their website, suggesting minimal adoption of this specific product or potential data reporting issues. The institution appears to function primarily as a community credit union with modest membership size relative to larger financial institutions, which may limit service breadth and technology capabilities compared to major banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Share Savings Accounts (regular savings with competitive interest rates)
Share Draft Accounts (checking accounts with debit cards, checks, and ATM access)
New auto loans (5.00% starting rate for purchase financing)
Used auto loans (6.00% starting rate for pre-owned vehicles)
Mortgage loans for home purchases and refinancing
Online and mobile banking with bill pay and fund transfers
Credit builder loans for credit establishment and improvement
Wealth management and dedicated financial planning
Auto loan calculator and mortgage payment calculator
pros: NCUA-insured federal credit union with member-ownership structure and community focus in Minot, ND
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.00% for new vehicles and 6.00% for used vehicles with average loans of $25,000
Credit builder loans available to help members establish or improve credit history
Comprehensive online and mobile banking with bill pay, fund transfers, and account management
Multiple financial calculators for auto loans, mortgages, savings, and credit card payoff planning
Full-service offerings including mortgages, investment planning, and wealth management
Dedicated member support with direct contact line (701) 838-9810 and branch locator services
cons: Zero active checking accounts reported according to NCUA data, indicating minimal adoption or unclear product viability
Small membership base (363 savings accounts) suggests limited resources and service capacity compared to larger institutions
Geographic limitation to Minot, ND service area may restrict accessibility for non-local members
Limited information about specific rates, fees, or account terms directly on website content provided
No evidence of competitive advantages in technology, fees, or product innovation versus national credit unions
best_for: Minot, ND residents seeking community-focused banking with personal relationships and local branch access
Credit union members interested in building credit through Credit Builder loans with guidance from local financial advisors
Auto buyers in the service area looking for competitive loan rates on vehicles with flexible terms
Savers wanting NCUA-insured accounts with member ownership benefits in a community-oriented institution
diagnosis: Tel-U-Watt Federal Credit Union is best suited for Minot, ND-area residents seeking personalized, community-focused banking with NCUA insurance protection and competitive auto lending rates. The primary caveat is their small membership base and apparent dormant checking account product, suggesting the institution may have limited service depth or technology infrastructure compared to larger credit unions or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
